title: Add public site card and concept detail pages (Golden Test 12)
problem: ticket-014 exports public-safe card JSON, but the public site only renders a list placeholder. Golden Test 12 requires static card detail, concept detail, and build-info rendering without local FastAPI or SQLite.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 12: public site renders exported cards in static mode.
docs/agents/02_ARCHITECTURE.md public routes GET /cards/[id] and GET /concepts/[id].
acceptance_criteria: Public site builds with card list, card detail, and concept detail routes using static JSON only.
Build info / last updated field renders on the list page.
No write, ingestion, or agent routes are added.
non_goals: Do not add public write routes or API endpoints.
Do not require local FastAPI or SQLite at build/runtime.
Do not implement Ollama or LangGraph.
